# Copilot Instructions - avm-tf-examples

## Repository Purpose

Example Terraform configurations for Azure Verified Modules (AVM).

## Code Patterns

- ✅ Each example is a self-contained Terraform configuration
- ✅ All examples use AVM modules from the Azure registry

## Quality Rules

- ✅ Run `terraform fmt -check -recursive` before committing
- ✅ Run `terraform validate` before committing
- ✅ Use checkmarks in documentation, no AI language or em dashes
